text: Investigation 2026-07-02: full inventory of internal-path leaks in public artifacts (all such paths are .Rbuildignore'd, so installed-package readers cannot follow them). README.md:107-108 (planning_docs/quality-tracking.md, backend-certification.md); vignettes/performance.Rmd:46 (quality-tracking §7), :142 (tests/testthat/test-track3-failure-modes.R), :191 (tools/baseline.csv), :196,199 (Rscript tools/benchmark-regression.R); man/amatrix_fallback_log.Rd:17 (source roxygen R/backend-registry.R:746); man/amatrix_benchmark_report.Rd:29 (source R/backend-calibration.R:215); WORST: R/policy.R:79 runtime warning() cites planning_docs path to end users. _pkgdown.yml, amatrix.Rmd, gpu.Rmd clean. Fix: replace with inline prose, runtime API refs (amatrix_backend_status/amatrix_benchmark_report), or full GitHub URLs; fix man leaks at roxygen source.
